MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-17-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IBOT INC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT TRANSFERS THIS ACTION TO ORANGE COUNTY AND PLAINTIFF IS TO REMIT ALL REQUIRED TRANSFER FEES. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH IS VERBATIM TO THE COURTS TENTATIVE RULING AND WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar May-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT IBOT INC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court transfers this action to Orange County and plaintiff is to remit all required transfer fees.

Counsel for defendants is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which is verbatim to the Courts tentative ruling and which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153 email: lnajera@sftc.org, Reported. (302/RBU)
